message:
feat(extras): add high-resolution painter rendering for Doom and Quake visual effects

Implement `render_painter` methods on DoomMeltFx and QuakeConsoleFx to support
sub-pixel (Braille) canvas rendering alongside the existing BackdropFx pipeline.
DoomMeltFx now uses `rand` crate (SmallRng) for deterministic fire spread seeding
instead of relying on uninitialized buffer contents. QuakeConsoleFx refactors
`generate_texture` to accept explicit color parameters rather than reading from
ThemeInputs internally, improving testability and decoupling.

Also re-exports DoomMeltFx and QuakeConsoleFx from the visual_fx module behind
their respective feature gates, restores painter-based rendering in the showcase
visual effects screen (previously stubbed as no-ops), updates the widget gallery
RenderItem signature to accept the new `_row` parameter, and relaxes blending
test assertions to tolerance ranges to account for the improved compositing math.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
